question:
Wumpuses are not sour. Each wumpus is a rompus. Rompuses are dull. Each rompus is a dumpus. Every dumpus is feisty. Jompuses are aggressive. Dumpuses are tumpuses. Tumpuses are opaque. Every tumpus is a numpus. Numpuses are hot. Numpuses are zumpuses. Zumpuses are large. Every zumpus is a vumpus. Vumpuses are blue. Every vumpus is an impus. Impuses are not aggressive. Impuses are yumpuses. Fae is a tumpus.

Is the following statement true or false? Fae is not aggressive.
